mapper.select: SELECT A.LICE_CD , A.LICE_TITLE , A.LICE_FILE_KEY , A.SORT , A.USE_YN , F.FILE_NM , F.SAVE_FILE_NM , F.SAVE_PATH , F.FILE_SIZ , F.FILE_EXTN , CONCAT(#{uploadBaseDir}, F.SAVE_PATH, F.SAVE_FILE_NM) AS FILE_FULL_PATH FROM TB_LICE A INNER JOIN TB_UPLD_FILE F ON A.LICE_FILE_KEY = F.UPLD_FILE_CD AND FILE_SEQ = 1 AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORT ASC
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO TB_LICE ( LICE_CD , LICE_TITLE , LICE_FILE_KEY , SORT , USE_YN , DEL_YN , CRE_USR_CD , CRE_DTM , UPD_USR_CD , UPD_DTM ) VALUES
( CASE WHEN #{rm.liceCd} IS NULL OR #{rm.liceCd} = '' THEN F_COM_UUID_PK() ELSE #{rm.liceCd} END , #{rm.liceTitle} , #{rm.liceFileKey} , #{rm.sort} , 'Y' , 'N' , #{ssnUsrCd} , SYSDATE() , #{ssnUsrCd} , SYSDATE() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE LICE_TITLE = VALUES(LICE_TITLE) , SORT = VALUES(SORT) , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = SYSDATE()
UPDATE TB_LICE SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , USE_YN = 'N' , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = SYSDATE() WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND LICE_CD = #{liceCd}
mapper.select: SELECT A.LICE_CD , F.UPLD_FILE_CD , F.FILE_SEQ , F.FILE_NM , F.SAVE_FILE_NM , F.SAVE_PATH , F.FILE_SIZ , F.FILE_EXTN FROM TB_LICE A INNER JOIN TB_UPLD_FILE F ON A.LICE_FILE_KEY = F.UPLD_FILE_CD AND FILE_SEQ = 1 AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.LICE_CD = #{liceCd} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'
